ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the ward */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the ward */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the ward */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the ward */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the ward data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward where the household is located */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of residents in the household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., family, single, shared) */,
  "income" REAL /* Total annual income of the household */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the household */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the household data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "total_male" INTEGER /* Total male population */,
  "total_female" INTEGER /* Total female population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or text field for age distribution */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population employed */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population unemployed */,
  "education_distribution" TEXT /* JSON or text field for education distribution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the population data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_details" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level achieved */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "voter_registration" INTEGER /* Whether the individual is registered to vote */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has health insurance */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the individual */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the individual's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_details_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ward_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward where the resource is located */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity or count of the resource */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the resource */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_resources_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals using the resource */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individuals using the resource */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individuals using the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES ward_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward receiving the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the service provider */,
  "service_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the service data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_services_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_services_provider FOREIGN KEY ("provider") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being requested */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the request */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the request data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES city_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the service provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the service provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the service provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the service provider */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the provider data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service statistic */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Total number of requests for the service */,
  "satisfaction_rating" REAL /* Average satisfaction rating for the service */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to respond to requests */,
  "complaints" INTEGER /* Number of complaints received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_statistics_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES city_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure project */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward where the project is located */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the infrastructure project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the project data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_projects_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infrastructure project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "funding_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the funding */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the funding data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES infrastructure_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the infrastructure project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project's impact */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits resulting from the project */,
  "risks" TEXT /* List of risks associated with the project */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the project */,
  "social_impact" TEXT /* Social impact of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the impact data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_impact_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES infrastructure_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward the user is assigned to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
